markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gathering community feedback and exploring a member feature.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**High-Value Content:** Shweta, a long-term member, finds the practical "build sessions" and podcasts most valuable, especially the raw, unpolished style that feels authentic.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**AI Use Cases:** Shweta's AI use cases are uniquely diverse, extending beyond B2B SaaS to include planning for a resort and a restaurant, offering a fresh perspective for the community.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**Content & Community Gaps:** Key feedback includes a need for more member interaction, text transcripts of videos for faster review and AI input, and a more intuitive prompt library.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Collaboration Opportunity:** Jason proposed a community feature on Shweta's non-SaaS AI applications, which Shweta agreed to.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Topics

### Member Profile & AI Use

  - [**Background:** 15–20 years as a tech writer (B2B SaaS, legal tech) and content marketing consultant for tech founders.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [**AI for Writing:**](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
      - [**HR Cloud:** AI-first client; uses AI for blogs, playbooks, and other assets.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [**Thomson Reuters:** No-AI policy; Shweta still used AI for data analysis (e.g., analyzing tables) before adding personal insights.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**AI for Non-SaaS Businesses:**](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [**Resort & Restaurant:** Used AI for initial planning, proposals, budgeting, and investor Q\&A.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [**Current Use:** Primarily for marketing ideas and refining investor communications.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
      - [**Digital Presence:** Limited to Google Maps; no website.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

### Community Feedback

  - [**Content Preferences:**](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [**Most Valuable:** "Build sessions" and podcasts.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [**Why:** The raw, unpolished style feels authentic and practical, unlike content from other communities.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Areas for Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**More Member Interaction:** Desires more discussion on diverse AI use cases, especially for solo founders.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Text Transcripts:** For podcasts/webinars → enables faster review and easier input into AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Current location is unintuitive; a dedicated, searchable tool is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**Courses:** Content felt like a repackaging of webinars, offering limited new value.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Collaboration & Job Inquiry

  - [**Proposed Feature:** Jason suggested a community feature showcasing Shweta's non-SaaS AI applications, which Shweta agreed to.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Job Inquiry:** Shweta asked about the Managing Editor role, having been rejected from the Asia-specific posting.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Jason's Response:** Confirmed the role is global but noted a preference for candidates with B2B SaaS backgrounds to better serve clients. He offered to check with the hiring team.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [Create a "Perplexity vs. Claude vs. ChatGPT" build session.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Invite Shweta to a private Slack channel to plan the community feature.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [Check on the Managing Editor application status.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [**Shweta:**](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [Prepare examples of AI use for the community feature.](https://fathom.video/share/pZ9mXNFqxKH6d7amT5u-Yt7x8dVtEnyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
